title: Maine Workers' Compensation Board — Homepage Announcements
description: No dedicated news page exists; announcements (assessment rates, fee schedule updates) are banner text blocks on the homepage with no per-item dates or links, so this is monitored by full-page fingerprint.

items.title: Page updated: Maine Workers' Compensation Board — Homepage Announcements
items.content_text: This page's content changed since the last check. No structured items could be extracted automatically; visit the page directly to review the update.
